title: Vanilla Refined
description: A modpack to enhance the experience of playing vanilla minecraft.
body:
![Logo Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f830977d1dae1845a1242abfd99b8858f823536.png)

### VANILLA REFINED!
This modpack is essentially vanilla Minecraft, perfect for survival mode but expanding your experience with a more beautiful, optimized, detailed game, quality of life improvement.

among these improvements, you will find mods and resource packs that improve the graphical quality of the game, bringing a new UI, connected textures, new particles, improved fog, new clouds, improved animations, improved sounds, new world generation and more.

### PERFORMANCE
Due to the amount of visual improvements in the game, this modpack may require more processing, however, it contains several mods to optimize the game to the maximum, making it possible to obtain stability and a high FPS.

### QUALITY OF LIFE
There are several mods available to improve your experience and make your life easier, including **BetterF3**, fully configured to show only the essentials when pressing F3 in a more beautiful and organized way, there is also **Right Click Harvest**, where you can plant and harvest automatically with one click on crops, or use a hoe to do this in a 3x3 area, and finally you will also find **Scribble** which brings improvements to writing in books in the game.

### POLISHED UI
Plenty of mods or textures improve the UI, such as adding animations when opening and closing the inventory, leave it in dark mode, custom UI for each different interface and little things like showing potion recipes in the Brewing Stand, and showing items inside a shulker box in the inventory.

### DETAILS
There are several mods and resource packs to add and improve game effects.
Such as **Particle Rain** and **Particular**, which improve rain and add new effects, as well as new firefly effects and water splashes, and new clouds, through **better clouds**. In addition to these, there's also **Visual Effects+**, which adds many in-game effects, such as custom fog for each biome, lighting effects on trees, sandstorms and snowstorms, particles that simulate birds and butterflies, and much more.

### NEW STYLE
In this modpack you will find a new experience when playing Minecraft thanks to the mod **Hold my items**, with a new vision for the hand and new animations for it, and along with that you will find many 3D items to improve your immersion.
